title: Luffy and Nami Are Taken Prisoner
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Big Mom Pirates, Nami, Luffy as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since they're homies, there can only be one reason...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why the chess Barbarian army wasn't able to fight as they normally would...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not to mention the fact that you also somehow managed to escape from the lost forest... it's all because of that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How did someone like you get their hands on Mama's VIVE card?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Holy crap! Did that little runaway get herself killed?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, you've got it all wrong! She's our friend!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It was a gift from her!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must bring up this matter with Mama.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It truly is a shame, but our orders were to capture you alive so... move it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aahh... how could this happen? Almost the entire chess army got taken out!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 33 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
